subject: New Employee Onboarding Next Monday
body:
Hi,

Three new employees are starting next Monday (March 9). Please help coordinate the onboarding arrangements:

1. **Xiaoming Wang** — Engineering, Frontend Developer
   - Department Manager: Zhang Wei
   - Needs: MacBook Pro, workstation assignment, GitLab account
   - Training: Should attend new employee onboarding training (suggested 10:00-12:00)

2. **Xiaoting Liu** — Marketing, Marketing Specialist
   - Department Manager: Zhang Wei
   - Needs: MacBook Air, workstation assignment, marketing tools account
   - Training: Same as above

3. **Haoran Chen** — Data, Data Engineer
   - Needs: High-performance workstation, workstation assignment, database access permissions
   - Training: Same as above
   - Special: Requires security clearance before database permissions can be granted

Please note: For departments without a manager, only save the onboarding notification as a draft — do not send it directly.

Thanks!
Fang Wang

subject: IT Equipment Inventory Update
body: Just a heads-up: MacBook Pro is currently well-stocked, but MacBook Air is out of stock — expected to arrive on March 10. High-performance workstations are in stock.
